headline: FedEx Shares Fall After 2026 Outlook Disappoints Despite Strong Fourth-Quarter Results (FDX)

headline: Why FedEx Stock Is Falling Sharply After Earnings Beat Expectations
summary: Shares of shipper  FedEx  fell after the company beat expectations for fourth quarter earnings and revenue and sees continued revenue growth this year.  Shares fell 7.6% in premarket trading Wednesday to $293.12.  FedEx reported fourth quarter revenue of $25 billion and adjusted earnings of $6.31 a share.

headline: From Inspiration to Ownership: PostalAnnex in Spring, Texas Enters New Chapter Under Former Human Resources and Business Financial Analyst
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Spring, TX to new owners, Veronica and Eduardo Alejandre. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will continue to benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided at this PostalAnnex location for nearly 10 years.

content.title: From Inspiration to Ownership: PostalAnnex in Spring, Texas Enters New Chapter Under Former Human Resources and Business Financial Analyst
content.summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing PostalAnnex location in Spring, TX to new owners, Veronica and Eduardo Alejandre. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will continue to benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided at this PostalAnnex location for nearly 10 years.

headline: Absci, FuelCell Energy surge premarket; Cerebras, FedEx tumble
summary: Investing.com - U.S. stock index futures were mixed on Wednesday, with the S&P 500 and Nasdaq edging higher after a bruising two-day selloff in technology and semiconductor shares. Investors were also looking ahead to earnings from memory chipmaker Micron for fresh clues on the outlook for artificial intelligence-related demand.

headline: An Analyst Says the FedEx Selloff Is a ‘Misinterpretation’ and the Revenue Beat Is Getting Buried
summary: The day after FedEx (NYSE:FDX) reported, the stock is down again, and an analyst on CNBC’s Closing Bell Overtime spent his segment trying to convince viewers that the people selling are reading the wrong line of the income statement. The shares finished the prior session lower and slid another 1.83% in Wednesday’s session to $311.43, ...
